MOTION FILED - MOD SUPPORT, CALENDAR MOTION: MODIFICATION CHILD SUPPORT; REVIEW /DETERMINE ARREARS ON JAN-08-2002 CONTINUED TO CHILD SUPPORT SERVICES CALENDAR ON SEP-03-2002 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 416 - PER ORDER(416) GENERAL ADVISEMENT GIVEN RE COMMISSIONER ACTING AS JUDGE PRO TEM; MOTHER PRESENT, FATHER PRESENT IN PRO PER, CSA= TROW; COURT ORDERS THAT FATHER PAY GUIDELINE CHILD SUPPORT $323.00 ($231.00 CHILD SUPPORT + $92.00 FOR TRAVEL EXPENSES AND SCHOOL) PER MONTH BY WAGE ASSIGNMENT COMMENCING 1/1/02; THE COURT DEEMS THE MONTHS OF 10/2001; 11/2001 AND 12/2001 AS ARREARS; ADMINISTRATIVE LIQUIDATION OF ARREARS; BOTH PARTIES ARE UNDER A STANDARD HEALTH INSURANCE ORDER; FATHER TO PROVIDE HEALTH INSURANCE IF AVAILABLE AT NO OR LOW COST PER MONTH; FATHER TO PROVIDE HEALTH/DENTAL INSURANCE CARDS TO MOTHER; BOTH PARTIES SHALL EQUALLY PAY 50/50 OF ALL UNINSURED MEDICAL EXPENSES OF MINOR IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE NOTICE OF RIGHTS AND RESPONSIBILITIES; COURT RESERVES JURISDICTION OVER THE ISSUE OF OVERTIME FOR BOTH PARTIES; DCSS TO PROVIDE A FULL ACCOUNTING TO FATHER; CONTINUED TO 9/3/02 @ 8:30AM IN ROOM 416 FOR REVIEW. (WIGHTMAN)PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY LEWIS GILLIAN CSR #12355; CLERK: LESLEY M. SADHU
